prompt: Please generate a high-quality appliance product advertisement poster with the subject 'coffee pot'. Use the subject as the visual core, automatically adapting to its corresponding lifestyle scene, auxiliary items, decorative elements, keywords, selling point badges, functional icon descriptions, and overall color style. The layout is: large main title at the top + handwritten sub-headline + keywords; the main product in the center placed in an exquisite lifestyle scene matching its usage logic; circular selling point badges and 4~5 functional icon descriptions added to the left and right; and the product name label displayed at the bottom. The overall style requires warmth and healing, soft warm light, realistic materials, modern clean typography, commercial advertising quality, low-saturation coordinated coloring, and 4K ultra-high definition, suitable for brand promotion, e-commerce posters, and social media visual displays. All elements are automatically generated around the subject and serve the subject, without overshadowing it, being cluttered, or low-quality.
